title: Tool: search_brain (Graphiti hybrid search)
userStory: As the agent, I want a search_brain tool so that I can pull entities and facts from the graph during a chat turn.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/lib/server/tools/search-brain.ts exports a tool with input_schema { query: string, limit?: number }
Handler POSTs to http://graphiti:8000/search/hybrid with { query, limit: 5 } and returns combined node + edge results
Internal call only on docker network; no bearer required
Tool registered with the chat endpoint
Verify: a chat turn that needs context invokes search_brain and the response cites returned entities
